name: Eric Stramel
title: Attending Physician
bio: Dr. Stramel earned his degree in osteopathic medicine at Des Moines University College of Osteopathic Medicine in Des Moines. His residency was served at Iowa Methodist Medical Center/University of Iowa and his fellowship at Creighton University Medical Center in Omaha, NE. Dr. Stramel is board certified in Internal Medicine, Pulmonary, Critical Care and Neuro-Critical Care.
education: Des Moines University College of Osteopathic Medicine, Des Moines, IA
residency: Iowa Methodist Medical Center, University of Iowa, Des Moines, IA
fellowship: Creighton University Medical Center, Omaha, NE
